title: In Hungary, Voters Exposed the Limits of China’s Ties to Orban
summary_full: Beijing depended on Hungary’s outgoing leader, Viktor Orban, to gain a toehold in Europe. A giant battery factory proved a step too far.
summary_public: Beijing depended on Hungary’s outgoing leader, Viktor Orban, to gain a toehold in Europe. A giant battery factory proved a step too far.

HU.label: negative
HU.evidence: Limits of China’s Ties to Orban
